case_title: UNITED CONTRACT SERVICES INC. VS. MARTIN BENOM PRO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY UNITED CONTRACT SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BENOM, MARTIN (PRO, AGENT FOR SERVICE: WE SERVICE AMERICA INC.) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $95.00 - SERVED MAR-06-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BENOM, MARTIN (PRO, AGENT FOR SERVICE: WE SERVICE AMERICA INC.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CONTRACT SERVICES INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CYRUS K. ANVARL--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED CONTRACT SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENOM, MARTIN (PRO, AGENT FOR SERVICE: WE SERVICE AMERICA INC.) $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,145.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BENOM, MARTIN (PRO, AGENT FOR SERVICE: WE SERVICE AMERICA INC.)
